descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime during Centennial Cup playoff series.
descriptionLong: Tony Bobbitt scored at 1:04 of overtime to lift the Richmond Sockeyes to a 4-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in a Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game on Wednesday night. The win gave Richmond a 2-1 series lead in the best-of-seven Tier 2 western final, with game four scheduled for Richmond on Saturday.
